Pick from one of our favorites or create your own. The possibilities for deliciousness are endless.

Ingredients
Willy’s Favorites
You don’t just serve fresh grilled Mexican food for over three decades without stumbling upon a masterpiece or two. Enjoy a few of our specialties, each complete with a side of FREE chips and salsa.
Willy Philly Burrito
Steak, rice, cheese dip, cheddar cheese, peppers & onions, and serrano crema.
Baja Burrito
Chicken or steak, Monterey Jack cheese, sautéed peppers & onions. Grilled and smothered in enchilada sauce and cheese dip.
Willy's Frito Burrito
Adobe chicken served with Frito chips, rice, pinto beans, sour cream, chipotle puree and Willy’s cheese dip.
Goal Bowl
Lettuce, adobe chicken, pico de gallo, guacamole, and cucumbers.
Taco Salad
A fried crispy tortilla shell loaded with ground beef, black beans, lettuce, cheese dip, pico de gallo, sour cream, and guacamole.
Southwest Chicken Salad
Grilled chicken, black beans, pico de gallo, corn salsa, jack cheese, guacamole, and tortilla strips.
Build Your Own
Make your favorite Willy’s item the way you like it. Every order comes with a side of FREE chips and salsa.
Build Your Own Burrito
Vegetarian rice, your choice of beans, and endless combinations of fresh ingredients tightly wrapped in a soft tortilla.
Build Your Own Bowl
All the delicious rice, beans, proteins, and veggies you love in a burrito minus the tortilla or served on the side.
Build Your Own Salad
Crisp greens with your choice of protein, fresh ingredients, and house-made dressings – Chipotle Ranch, Lite Tomatillo Ranch and SW Vinaigrette.
Build Your Own Quesadilla
Soft flour tortilla stuffed with your favorite protein and grilled to crispy perfection and served with pico de gallo salsa and sour cream. Make it a Grande Quesadilla – larger tortilla with more ingredients and guacamole included.
Build Your Own Tacos
Two tacos served in your choice of soft flour, soft corn, or crispy corn tortillas. Topped with your favorite freshly made ingredients.
Nachos
Homemade tortilla chips topped with whatever you want. Served with beans, salsa, sour cream, and guacamole.
Family Meals
Take It Home. Build Your Own.
Our Build-Your-Own Taco Box is the perfect solutions for families on the go, small gatherings, work meetings, or when there is just no time to cook.
Taco Box
Feeds 4-6 people and includes the following:
Choice of two proteins, lettuce, Monterey Jack cheese, pico de gallo, sour cream, choice of one salsa and 16 hard/soft shells.
Side items: Rice, choice of black/pinto beans and chips
Add-ons: Cheese Dip, Guacamole or 6 Chocolate Chip Cookies
Salsa Bar
We love our variety and that our chips and salsa are free with every entrée purchase.
Chili D'Arbol
A truly unique sauce made from small dried chilies called chili D’arbol mixed with a delicate blend of pumpkin seeds, sesame seeds, cumin, clove and one particular ingredient we’d like to keep secret. Some call it our “Mojo” sauce because…well, we don’t really know why but it sounds cool.
Chipotle Salsa
We blend charred tomato puree with chipotle peppers for a rich, smoky flavor that’s a true Willy’s original. You can spot the Chipotle Salsa by its deep red coloring and signature black bits of charred tomato skin.
Habanero Salsa
This salsa has the sweet tangy flavor of the Tomatillo Salsa, the rich and smoky flavor of the Chipotle Salsa and the unmistakable zip of the habanero chili – the world’s hottest pepper. Thankfully, we grilled the habaneros to tone down the heat and bring out the pepper’s full flavor.
Tomatillo Salsa
Our beloved green sauce is made from tart tomatillos smoothed out with fresh jalapenos, onions and a cilantro. Our Tomatillo has a bright flavor that goes great with meats, especially our steak.
Sides & Sweets
Chips and salsa are always free, but why stop there? Our homemade guacamole, mouth-watering cheese dip, or fresh-baked cookie are the perfect addition to any meal.
Cheese Dip
Liquid heaven in a cup. Served with a side of homemade tortilla chips.
Guacamole
Homemade daily with ripe avocados. Served with a side of homemade tortilla chips.
Cheesy Beef-amole
We combine our favorite flavors of Cheese Dip, Ground Beef and Guacamole to make a dip that you can’t stop dipping. Served with our fresh tortilla chips.
Beefy Cheese Dip
Our Beefy Cheese dip is just like our Cheesy Beef-amole, but without the guacamole. We combine our delicious Cheese Dip & Ground Beef to make a dip that’s irresistible. Served with our fresh tortilla chips.
Chocolate Chip Cookies
Baked in-house
Drinks
With so many options to choose from, you’re sure to find the perfect beverage to pair with your meal. Try our freshly made fruit lemonades available in our self-serve beverage bar.
Fountain Drinks
Sodas, Iced Tea, and homemade lemonade.
Bottled Drinks
20 oz Coke, Diet Coke, and Sprite
Snapple
Strawberry Kiwi and Peach Tea
Coke de Mexico and Fanta de Mexico
Topo Chico
Bottled Water & 1 Liter Fiji Water
Nestle Pure Life bottled water
Fiji Water – 1 liter
Alcoholic Drinks
Beer and margaritas available at select locations – see locations page
Kids
Kid’s Combos are served with fresh chips, cookie and fountain drink. Burrito, taco and quesadillas include chicken, rice, beans, jack cheese and salsa but we will gladly customize to your kiddos liking! (Ages 12 and under only please.)
Kid's Burrito Combo
Vegetarian rice, your choice of beans, and endless combinations of fresh ingredients tightly wrapped in a soft tortilla…. but kid-sized.
Kid's Taco Combo
One taco served in your choice of soft flour, soft corn, or crispy corn tortillas. Topped with your favorite freshly made ingredients…. but (again) kid-sized.
Kid's Quesadilla Combo
Soft flour tortilla stuffed with your favorite protein and grilled to crispy perfection. Served with pico de gallo salsa and sour cream…. but (you guessed it) kid-sized.
